## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## User Impact

- What user scenario is improved?
- Any behavior change or migration note?

## Checklist

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`pytest tests -q`)
- [ ] Desktop build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No secrets or local env files included
- [ ] Docs/README updated if API or UX changed

## Screenshots / Demo (if UI change)

Add screenshots or short GIF if applicable.
